assembly_metadata.label: SYNTHETIC FIXTURE OUTPUT - NOT FOR APPLICATION USE

resume_strategy: Position as a Platform Product Manager with verified product outcomes, role-relevant evidence, and Product OS proof used only as supporting context.

selected_headline.text: Platform Product Manager | Architecture, Reliability & Technical Strategy

selected_summary.text: Product leader focused on Platform Product Manager roles, with evidence across APIs, Architecture, Reliability, Scalability. Selected proof points include LOG-THR-005, LOG-MRR-002, LOG-DEL-004. This draft uses Product OS as a supporting proof layer while preserving employer experience, metrics, and interview-defensible claims.

bullets.text: Led platform architecture and DevOps maturity initiatives that improved throughput 15% and accelerated releases 2x.
Connected AI/ML personalization, engagement, and recurring revenue outcomes, contributing to +25% engagement and +20% MRR growth.
Aligned Engineering, Design, Sales, and Marketing around unified roadmap governance, tripling delivery velocity and cutting release cycles 50%.
Owned zero-to-one platform product strategy that generated Rs. 1M+ ARR through pricing, packaging, and upsell decisions.
Framed reliability as a product outcome in payment environments supporting 10M+ monthly transactions.
Owned MVP strategy and launch for core B2B platform modules, onboarding 15+ paying customers within six months.
Improved customer engagement to 83% and CSAT to 94% through targeting, segmentation, and multichannel integration.
Improved roadmap economics by reducing development cost 25% and time-to-market 15% through prioritization discipline.
Drove executive-aligned monetization decisions that scaled Job Guarantee revenue from Rs. 1M to Rs. 10M.
Led product lifecycle work from ideation to launch, connecting market analysis and competitive insight to roadmap decisions.
